nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 南非企鹅
nodes.summary: 南非企鹅（African penguin，学名 Spheniscus demersus），在图谱中标记为极危（CR）物种，主要分布于旧大陆、阿爾哥亞灣、格貝哈，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、气候变化。

nodes.name: 格貝哈
nodes.summary: 格貝哈是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括南非企鹅，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: CR
nodes.summary: CR表示 IUCN 极危等级，当前关联174种鸟类，如勺嘴鹬、加州神鹫、菲律宾鹰等174种鸟类。

nodes.name: 阿爾哥亞灣
nodes.summary: 阿爾哥亞灣是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Fynbos buttonquail、南非企鹅，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 旧大陆
nodes.summary: 旧大陆是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联19种鸟类，包括大红鹳、Black-necked stilt、领燕鸻等19种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 气候变化
nodes.summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is the only penguin found in the Old World

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The African penguin is found on the southern and southwestern coast of Africa, living in colonies on 27 islands between Namibia and Algoa Bay, near Port Elizabeth, South Africa. It is the only penguin species that breeds in Africa, and its presence gave name to the Penguin Islands

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The African penguin is found on the southern and southwestern coast of Africa, living in colonies on 27 islands between Namibia and Algoa Bay, near Port Elizabeth, South Africa. It is the only penguin species that breeds in Africa, and its presence gave name to the Penguin Islands

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Once extremely numerous, the African penguin is now the rarest species of penguin, classified as critically endangered, with its population declining rapidly due to a combination of several threats, such as habitat loss, overfishing and climate change

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Once extremely numerous, the African penguin is now the rarest species of penguin, classified as critically endangered, with its population declining rapidly due to a combination of several threats, such as habitat loss, overfishing and climate change
